item.title: International Education Fair, Hyderabad
item.dc:creator: applymeta987
item.content:encoded: The MetaApply International Education Fair offers you the chance to meet representatives from over 20+ universities to help you achieve your dream of studying abroad. Whether you're a recent 12th-grade graduate or have completed your undergraduate degree, explore your international education options with us. Discover potential universities and courses, and get information on scholarships, visa guidance, English proficiency exams, educational loans, and more. Walk-in to our experience centre to begin your successful study-abroad journey!
item.excerpt:encoded: Walk-in to our experience centres and get an on-spot offer letter for your dream destination

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Destination counselling | Programme and university shortlisting | Application assistance | Academic requirements | Career Opportunities

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Thanks for sharing. I read many of your blog posts, cool, your blog is very good.
Your article helped me a lot, is there any more related content? Thanks! https://www.binance.com/register?ref=QCGZMHR6

item.title: Open doors to quality Medical Education in Georgia
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded: Attend our exclusive webinar to discover Georgia's top MBBS programs at Alte University and International Black Sea University! Learn about the country, explore university portfolios, understand academic requirements, and more. Gain the insights you need to offer your students world-class medical education opportunities.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Open doors to quality Medical Education in Georgia

Register now to empower your students' educational aspirations!

item.title: Know about University of Tulsa
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Tune in to our informative webinar to discover why the USA stands as the ultimate destination for higher education.
Get insights into the diverse courses offered at The University of Tulsa, understand the academic requirements, and discover the accommodation options available. Don’t miss out on guiding your students toward academic excellence!

item.title: Know about Middle Tennessee University
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Attend an insightful webinar highlighting why the USA stands out as the premier destination for your students. This session will be hosted by Reema Doshi (Recruitment Manager – South Asia), Middle Tennessee State University (MTSU).
Discover the comprehensive portfolio of Middle Tennessee State University, understand the detailed admission requirements, and learn about its prestigious accreditation and recognition.

item.title: Central Michigan University Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded: Attention all our recruitment partners from across the globe! An important university webinar is scheduled for 30th July at 4 PM (IST). This webinar will be hosted by Moumita Biswas, Regional Representative – International Recruitment. Gain valuable insights into Central Michigan University to offer your students the best. Participate in a live Q&A session to learn more about the university's portfolio, available courses, academic requirements, and much more. Sign up now to help your students achieve their academic dreams in the USA!

item.title: Become the Next American Scholar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded: Join South University's webinar to explore why the USA is a top choice for higher education. Learn about courses, eligibility, scholarship secrets, and engage in an interactive Q&A session. Established in 1899, South University offers programs designed to meet industry needs, ensuring practical knowledge and hands-on experience. Discover why South University is the right choice for your study abroad journey.

item.title: Bradley University Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Recruitment partners, are you prepared to increase the number of students enrolled in STEM programs in the United States? Come join us for a special webinar on Bradley University to get insights that will help you assist your students succeed.
Engage in direct communication with Bradley University's Associate Director of International Enrolments - South Asia, Manmeet Kaur.
Agents have a great chance to expand their knowledge and enrol more students with this wonderful opportunity. Get registered right away to guarantee your seat and provide your students with the best American education possible.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: University portfolio | Available courses | Academic requirements | Scholarship opportunities | Q&A session

item.title: IELTS Masterclass Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Ready to conquer your IELTS exams and hit those desired band scores? We're back to share all the tips and tricks you need. Join our free IELTS webinar on 25th August 2024 at 11:30 AM (IST), hosted by Noorjahan – Certified IELTS Trainer, MetaApply. Don’t miss this opportunity to experience a real IELTS exam, boost your confidence, and get one step closer to studying in your dream country and college.
So, what are you waiting for? Register now and let's make your IELTS goals a reality!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Introduction to English Proficiency Tests | How English Test Proficiency impacts academic success? | Overview of the test format and scoring | Language support services and preparatory courses | Internships and work opportunities | Q&A

item.title: Discover the ultimate guide to studying in the USA
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Your American dream is within reach when you apply with MetaApply. We're here to make your study abroad journey simple, fast, and stress-free. Whether you're stuck on submitting applications or need visa guidance, we've got you covered!
Join our upcoming destination webinar on 31st August from 12 PM (IST). This session will be packed with valuable insights, so don’t miss out—mark your calendars for the date and time.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the ultimate guide to studying in the USA

item.title: On-the-spot assessment for GBS Dubai
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an exclusive spot assessment event with GBS Dubai University, designed for aspiring students seeking to study abroad. This event offers a unique opportunity for 1:1 interaction with university representatives, where you'll receive personalized application guidance and explore progression pathways. Learn about various scholarship opportunities and get ready to fast-track your academic journey—qualified candidates can receive an offer within just 48 hours!*
Don't miss this chance to take the next step toward your global education.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Meet our university representatives | On-spot assessment | Document verification | Scholarship opportunities | Application assistance

item.title: International University of Applied Sciences (IU) Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Join our exclusive webinar for the International University of Applied Sciences on 12th September at 5 PM (IST). Hosted by Daksh Shrivastav, Business Development Manager at IU, this session will provide valuable insights into how you can offer your students a world-class German education and prepare them for success in a global environment.
Don’t miss out—register today!

item.title: On-spot Assessment for Plymouth Marjon University
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Save the date now and join Mr. Chinmay Chitransh, Business Head, MENA Region, PMU and Ms. Anandita Jitt, PSM - APAC-MENA, MetaApply for a live on-spot assessment event. You’ll gain valuable insights about on-the-spot assessment, including 1:1 interaction, how to secure an offer letter within 48 hours, and career pathways to countries like the USA, Spain, and Germany. 100% placement guarantee is just a step away from enrolment at PMU.
Don’t miss this chance to take the next step towards a successful future!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: On-spot Assessment for Plymouth Marjon University
Meet our university representatives | On-spot assessment | Document verification | Scholarship opportunities | Application assistance

item.title: Curtin University Dubai Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Ready to pursue a master’s degree in one of the world's safest and most dynamic cities? Join us for an exclusive webinar on 25th September at 12:00 PM (IST), presented by Daniel Adkins, Group CEO - Transnational Academic Group Middle East, to explore all that Curtin University has to offer.
Save the date and be part of this insightful session where we'll cover the university's portfolio, available courses, academic requirements, and scholarship opportunities. Get all your questions answered and discover how Curtin University can help transform your students' career with a world-class education. We look forward to having you with us

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: University portfolio | Available courses | Academic requirements | Scholarship opportunities | Q&A session

item.title: University of Europe for Applied Sciences Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Exciting news! We’re thrilled to invite you to join an exclusive webinar for the University of Europe for Applied Sciences on 25th September 2024 from 5 PM onwards, presented by Karthik Kashyap, Senior Business Development Manager.
Discover how you can help your students pursue a world-class education at the University of Europe for Applied Sciences, preparing them to thrive in the land of automobiles.
Take advantage of the live Q&A segment to learn more about UE’s diverse course offerings, academic requirements, and additional opportunities.

Join us for an interactive Q&A session with an esteemed industry expert and begin your journey to studying in the UAE with MetaApply!﻿

item.title: Trinity Western University Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Ready to take your academic journey to the next level? Join us for an exclusive webinar on 25th October at 3:00 PM (IST), presented by Trinity Western University, to explore what this renowned institution has to offer.
Mark your calendar and be part of this insightful session where we’ll dive into the university’s diverse programs, academic requirements, and scholarship opportunities. Get all your questions answered and discover how Trinity Western University can help shape your future with a world-class education in one of Canada’s most vibrant and welcoming environments.
We look forward to having you with us!

item.title: On-spot Assessment for International University of Applied Sciences (IU)
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Save the date and join Daksh Shrivastav, Business Development Manager at International University of Applied Sciences (IU), Germany, for an exciting on-spot assessment session on 28th October 2024 at 4:00 PM (IST).
In this interactive event, you’ll gain valuable insights into IU’s diverse programs, receive application assistance, explore scholarship opportunities, and participate in a live Q&A session with the university. Don’t miss this opportunity to take the next step towards your future with IU!
We look forward to seeing you there!

item.title: On-spot Assessment for SRH Berlin University of Applied Sciences
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an exclusive on-the-spot assessment on 12th November at 5 PM (IST), where you can have one-on-one discussions with Yeshoda Kamala, Regional Manager-South Asia at SRH [tag university]. This session is a unique opportunity to receive personalized feedback on your application and gain valuable insights into clear progression pathways.
In addition to tailored guidance, you’ll also learn about available scholarship opportunities to support your journey. Whether you’re looking to enhance your application or explore funding options, this session will provide the resources you need to reach your dream destination. Register now to secure your spot and take the next step towards your academic future.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: On-spot Assessment for SRH Berlin University of Applied Sciences

item.title: Avila University Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Join our exclusive webinar to learn how you can help students increase their chances of enrolling at Avila University, a leading institution in American higher education. Designed specifically for education agents, this session will provide valuable insights into Avila's programs, admissions process, and student support services, equipping you with the tools to better guide your students towards success.
You’ll have the opportunity to engage directly with Rahul Sahu, Business Development Manager at Avila University, gaining first-hand knowledge of the university’s offerings and how to best support your students' applications. Don’t miss out on this chance to expand your expertise and help your students access top-tier education. Register now to secure your seat!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: University portfolio | Available courses | Academic requirements | Scholarship opportunities | Interactive Q&A session

item.title: Roosevelt University B2B Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded: Join us for an insightful webinar on Roosevelt University, hosted by Puligilla Ramesh, International Recruitment Manager for India, on 19th November 2024 at 4 PM (IST). This exclusive session will provide an in-depth look at everything Roosevelt University has to offer, including a wide range of academic programs, admission requirements, and opportunities for international students. It’s a great chance to gain valuable insights that will help you guide your students toward their educational goals. Plus, a live Q&A will be available to answer any questions you may have in real time. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to learn more about one of the leading universities for students looking to study abroad!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: University portfolio | Available courses | Academic requirements | Scholarship opportunities | Interactive Q&A session

item.title: DTMU University B2B Webinar
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
Help your students achieve their dream of becoming doctors without the financial burden. Join our exclusive webinar on 5th December at 4 PM, hosted by Mr. George Svanidze, Foreign Relations Manager, to explore the affordable and renowned medical program offered by DTMU.
This session will provide in-depth insights into DTMU’s curriculum and opportunities, equipping you with the knowledge to guide your students toward a cost-effective medical education. Plus, the live Q&A session is your chance to address all your queries and learn how to offer the best solutions to your students.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Know about DTMU's 35 years of legacy | Competitive fee structure | No IELTS and entrance exam required | Know about their Doctor of Medicine (6 Years) program | Partnered with 32 hospitals in Tbilisi for clinical rotation | Live Q&A Session

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Thanks for sharing. I read many of your blog posts, cool, your blog is very good.
Your point of view caught my eye and was very interesting. Thanks. I have a question for you.

item.title: ICEF South Asia 2025
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
MetaApply is excited to be part of #ICEFSouthAsia2025!
As we step into one of the most impactful global education networking events, our team is ready to explore new opportunities, build strong partnerships, and drive innovation in international higher education.
Join us at Exhibit Table 10 to connect with CEO Prashant Salie and Associate Director Pawan Bhatia, who will be sharing valuable insights and opportunities with student recruitment partners, universities, and industry leaders.
Let’s shape the future of student mobility together! See you at ICEF South Asia 2025!

item.title: ICEF Dubai 2025
item.dc:creator: ekta
item.content:encoded:
As the landscape of global education evolves, we’re committed to creating new opportunities for students, agents, and universities worldwide. From strategic pathways to impactful partnerships, we’re shaping what’s next in international student mobility.
📍 Visit us at Exhibit Table 31 and connect with CEO Prashant Salie and Associate Director Pawan Bhatia as they share key insights and collaboration opportunities.
Let’s connect, collaborate, and challenge boundaries to redefine the future of higher education!

item.title: ICEF Eurasia 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
As global education continues to evolve, we are committed to unlocking new opportunities for students, agents, and universities worldwide. Through strategic pathways and meaningful partnerships, we are shaping the next era of international student mobility.
📍 Visit us at Exhibit Table 5 at Hilton Istanbul Bosphorus, Türkiye, and connect with Associate Director Pawan Bhatia as he shares key insights and explores collaboration prospects.
Let’s connect, collaborate, and drive the future of higher education forward!

item.title: South University B2B Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an exclusive B2B webinar on 19th March 2025 at 4:30 PM (IST), tailored for study abroad agents. This session will provide valuable insights to help boost student enrolments at South University. Learn about the university’s portfolio, available courses, academic requirements, scholarship opportunities, and the latest visa updates for students.
We’ll also host an interactive Q&A session, allowing you to ask questions and gain a deeper understanding to better guide your students. Don’t miss this opportunity to enhance your knowledge and build stronger connections. Register now!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: 1. University portfolio 2. Available courses 3. Academic requirements 4. Scholarship opportunities 5. Visa updates 6. Interactive Q&A session

item.title: SRUC Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
We are excited to invite our valued recruitment partners to an exclusive university webinar by Scotland’s Rural College (SRUC) – a globally recognised institution in agricultural and rural business education. Scheduled for 24th April 2025 at 3:30 PM (IST), this session will provide in-depth insights into SRUC’s BSc and BA (Hons) programmes in Agriculture and Rural Business.
Attendees will gain valuable information on career outcomes, academic requirements, scholarships, and student life in the UK. The webinar will also feature a live Q&A session with distinguished speakers including Mr. Michael Lawson (Head of International), Prof. Philip Wrigglesworth and Prof. Rachael Stark (Senior Lecturers), and Ms. Geetika Mehta (South Asia Representative).
This is an excellent opportunity to strengthen your understanding of SRUC’s offerings and better guide your students toward high-impact, sustainability-focused careers. Register now to secure your spot, as seats are limited.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: 1. Meet the minds behind UK education excellence 2. Explore BSc & BA (hons) in agriculture & rural business management 3. Insights into courses and career options in the UK 4. Entry requirements, scholarships & campus experience 5. Live Q&A with HODs &

item.title: GETEX 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Elevate Your Education and Career at GETEX Step into your future at the Gulf Education & Training Exhibition (GETEX) — the region’s most trusted education and career event. Meet top university representatives face-to-face, explore study abroad options tailored to your personal goals, and receive free expert guidance to shape your academic and career path. Whether you’re a student, a parent, or a professional seeking new opportunities, GETEX has something for everyone. Discover global programs, internship opportunities with leading organizations, and career development support — all under one roof. Don’t miss your chance to connect, learn, and grow.

item.title: Bengaluru- 24th May 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Explore top universities from across Europe at the International Education Fair 2025 in Bengaluru! Meet official university representatives, get insights into study programs, scholarships, and visa processes, and receive expert guidance tailored to your goals. Whether you're considering undergraduate or postgraduate studies, this is your chance to take the first step toward studying in Europe with confidence

item.title: Bengaluru- 31st May 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Thinking of studying in the UK? Don’t miss the UK-focused edition of the International Education Fair 2025 in Bengaluru! Meet university officials face-to-face, understand admission criteria, explore scholarships, and get clarity on student visa requirements. Whether you're applying for your bachelor’s degree or a master's, this fair is your gateway to world-class UK education.

item.title: Hyderabad- 31st May 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Looking at Europe or the UAE for higher education? The International Education Fair 2025 in Hyderabad brings you direct access to university reps from both regions. Learn about admission timelines, courses, scholarships, and visa assistance—all under one roof. Get personalised support to plan your study abroad journey confidently and efficiently.

item.title: Hyderabad- 7th June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Your pathway to the UK starts here! Join the International Education Fair 2025 at MetaApply IE’s Hyderabad Experience Centre and meet leading UK university representatives in person. Explore course options, get expert advice on admissions and scholarships, and gain clarity on the student visa process. Don’t miss this opportunity to plan your study abroad dream the right way.

item.title: Kolkata- 7th June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Interested in studying in Europe? Attend the International Education Fair 2025 in Kolkata and interact with top European universities directly. Learn everything from program options and entry requirements to funding and post-study opportunities. This is your chance to ask questions, get answers, and build a strong application for your future in Europe.

item.title: Jaipur- 14th June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: UK calling? Head to the International Education Fair 2025 at MetaApply IE’s Jaipur Experience Centre and meet top UK university representatives. Get insights into the right courses, understand scholarship opportunities, and get help with your visa planning. It’s your one-stop platform to take informed steps toward building a global career with a UK degree.

item.title: Pune- 14th June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Study in Europe with confidence! Join us at the International Education Fair 2025 in Pune and engage with top university reps offering programs across various fields. Learn about scholarships, timelines, visa support, and more. This is a valuable chance to align your academic goals with the right European opportunities.

item.title: Jaipur- 21st June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Set your sights on Europe! Visit the International Education Fair 2025 in Jaipur to interact directly with representatives from leading European universities. Get guidance on course selection, scholarship options, visa procedures, and more—all in one place. Whether you're planning undergraduate or postgraduate studies, this event is your launchpad to a successful study abroad journey in Europe.

item.title: Kolkata- 21st June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Thinking about studying in the UK? Join us at the International Education Fair 2025 in Kolkata and meet official representatives from top UK universities. Understand application requirements, explore scholarship options, and get assistance with your visa planning. It’s your chance to ask questions, get expert advice, and move one step closer to your dream university in the UK.

item.title: Pune- 21st June 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Explore world-class education in the UAE! The International Education Fair 2025 in Pune connects you with top UAE university representatives who will help you understand available courses, entry requirements, scholarships, and the visa process. Whether you're eyeing business, tech, or medical fields—this event offers the insights and access you need to get started.

item.title: MBBS Abroad Webinar (India)
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
With MBBS seats in India being scarce and competition intensifying each year, countless deserving students are left without a clear path forward. MetaApply’s Study MBBS Abroad solution offers a strong and practical Plan B—providing access to globally recognized medical programs, advanced facilities, and cost-effective education. Join our exclusive webinar to discover how you can guide students toward top international medical universities, while expanding your offerings and growing your business through a trusted MBBS abroad network. Why Should You Attend?
  • Discover top NMC-approved medical universities across popular study destinations
  • Understand the eligibility criteria, admission process, and visa requirements
  • Get clarity on fee structures, scholarships, and affordability
  • Learn about partner commissions, incentives, and lead support
  • Participate in a live Q&A with MetaApply’s MBBS experts

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: 1. Explore top medical universities 2. Eligibility criteria and admission process 3. Fee structure and scholarship opportunities 4. Commissions, incentives & lead support 5. Live Q&A session

item.title: Destination Webinar (Singapore)
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Are you a Sri Lanka-based study abroad consultant looking to offer your students a world-class education in Asia’s most global city – Singapore? Join us for an exclusive Destination Webinar on 18th July at 3:30 PM (IST) and gain valuable insights to better guide your students. The session will cover everything from top universities and course offerings to entry requirements, eligibility, and scholarship opportunities.
You'll also have the chance to get your questions answered live. This informative session will be led by Kiran Bali, our Subject Matter Expert, who will provide in-depth knowledge and recruitment strategies tailored for Singapore. Don’t miss this opportunity to elevate your counselling services and stay ahead in the upcoming intake season.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Agenda - 1. Know about the destination 2. Scholarship opportunities 3. University portfolio 4. Courses available 5. Entry requirements 6. Q&A session

item.title: Destination Webinar (Malaysia)
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Calling all education consultants from Pakistan, Nepal, Bangladesh, and Sri Lanka! If you're looking to guide your students towards a high-quality and affordable study destination in Asia, Malaysia could be the perfect choice. Join us for an exclusive Destination Webinar on 18th July at 5:00 PM (IST) to explore why Malaysia is fast becoming the next big study hub. Discover top universities, trending courses, easy entry requirements, scholarship opportunities, and more all designed to help you recruit effectively this intake season.
This insightful session will be conducted by Kiran Bali, Subject Matter Expert, who will share in-depth knowledge and answer all your queries during the live Q&A.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Agenda - 1. Know about the destination 2. Scholarship opportunities 3. University portfolio 4. Courses available 5. Entry requirements 6. Q&A session

item.title: MBBS Abroad Webinar (Pakistan)
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Pakistan-based education consultants, don’t miss our MBBS Abroad Webinar on 18th July at 11:00 AM (UK Time). Explore top universities in Kyrgyzstan, Georgia, and Russia, understand eligibility, fees, scholarships, and commission benefits—led by Anandita Jitt, Product Success Manager. Why Should You Attend?
  • Discover top NMC-approved medical universities across popular study destinations
  • Understand the eligibility criteria, admission process, and visa requirements
  • Get clarity on fee structures, scholarships, and affordability
  • Learn about partner commissions, incentives, and lead support
  • Participate in a live Q&A with MetaApply’s MBBS experts

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Agenda - 1. Top medical universities 2. Eligibility criteria and admission process 3. Fee structure and scholarship opportunities 4. Commissions, incentives and lead support 5. Live Q&A session

item.title: Educational Leadership Connect
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
MetaApply is proud to host Educational Leaders Connect—a meaningful gathering of education leaders and decision-makers across schools, colleges, and universities.
This event serves as a collaborative platform to engage with academic institutions and introduce MetaApply’s comprehensive global education ecosystem. Our goal is to build lasting partnerships that empower students to become future-ready and globally competitive.
At MetaApply, we work closely with institutions to guide students through every stage of their education journey—from career counseling, English Language Test mentorship and university shortlisting to application processing, scholarships, and visa assistance. With a presence across key global destinations and a strong network of expert counsellors, we simplify what can often be a complex process, helping your students take confident steps toward world-class opportunities.
Join us to explore how we can work together in shaping global pathways for the next generation.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Registration and welcome ceremony Overview of MetaApply’s student services & global ecosystem Addressing queries and exploring customized solutions Networking Lunch Closing remarks and giveaway ceremony

item.title: MBBS Abroad Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
If you're working with students who aspire to pursue medical education overseas, this webinar is designed to give you a competitive edge. What to Expect
  • A curated list of leading, NMC-approved medical universities
  • Step-by-step guidance on eligibility criteria, admission process, and visa requirements
  • Transparent insights into fee structures, available scholarships, and affordability
  • Detailed overview of commissions, incentives, and verified lead support from MetaApply IE
  • Live Q&A session with Anandita Jitt, Product Success Manager at MetaApply IE

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
• Explore top medical universities
  • Eligibility criteria and admission process
  • Fee structure and scholarship opportunities
  • Commissions, incentives & lead support
  • Live Q&A session

item.title: University Webinar | Western Balkans University
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join us for a power-packed session designed exclusively for student recruitment partners. Gain direct insights from Western Balkans University (WBU) leadership and unlock new opportunities for your students. What to Expect: Overview of Western Balkans University and its MBBS programme Step-by-step admission process and eligibility criteria Transparent fee structure and commission model Dedicated partner support and onboarding benefits Live Q&A with university decision-makers

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Agenda -
  1. Know about the University
  2. Eligibility Criteria & Admission Process
  3. Fee structure
  4. Commission Structure & Support
  5. Interactive Q&A Session

item.title: Spot Assessment Day
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Explore your study abroad options with direct access to top universities from the UK, UAE, and Europe. This Spot Assessment Day offers students a chance to connect one-on-one with university representatives, get on-the-spot profile evaluations, and receive expert guidance on admissions, scholarships, MBBS programs, and course selections.
Designed for students looking to study overseas in upcoming intakes, the event offers valuable insights into the application process and available opportunities — with both walk-in and virtual participation available for added convenience.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
What to expect:
Meet university delegates face-to-face or online Instant profile assessments and feedback Info sessions on scholarships, visa timelines, and course options UG, PG & MBBS abroad guidance

item.title: Student Connect Session
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join us for an exciting session with PFH – Private University of Applied Sciences, Germany, and discover how you can shape your future through cutting-edge programs in digitalisation and automation. Learn about PFH’s academic offerings, scholarships, and career opportunities – directly from university experts! You can walk in at our Noida Study Abroad Centre or attend virtually from anywhere in India. This session features live interaction with Dr. Richard Degenhardt (Senior Scientist & Professor, PFH) and Dr. Latika Chaudhary (President – India Operations, PFH), who will guide you through the university portfolio, courses, and global career prospects.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
What to expect:
-Meet university delegates face-to-face or online -Know about courses and admission criteria -Info sessions on scholarships opportunities -Future prospects -Interactive Q&A Session

item.title: IELTS Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join our Live IELTS Webinar on 04 October 2025 from 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM (IST) and learn how to boost your IELTS score with proven strategies. Led by Sunithi Sony, Certified IELTS Trainer, this free demo class will provide winning techniques, practical tips, and access to IELTS sample papers to help you prepare more effectively. Don’t miss this opportunity to gain expert guidance and take a confident step toward achieving your desired IELTS band.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
What to expect:
  • Get a FREE Demo class
  • Know how to score high in IELTS
  • Access to IELTS sample papers
  • Interactive Q&A Session

item.title: UK & Ireland - Study Abroad Fair
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join our Free UK & Ireland - Study Abroad Fair on 11 October 2025 from 12:00 PM to 3:00 PM (IST) and explore affordable education options in the UK and Ireland. Connect directly with university representatives, learn about scholarships, and get on-spot assessments for 2026 intakes. Plus, get free guidance on visa and loan support to simplify your study abroad journey.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Event Agenda:
  • Talk directly to university representatives
  • Explore available scholarships
  • Get on-spot profile assessment
  • Free visa and education loan support
  • Q&A session with experts

item.title: Study Abroad in Germany Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join our Germany Study Abroad Webinar on 11 October 2025 from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM (IST) and explore top universities and career opportunities in Germany. Learn about admission requirements, tuition-free education, and get on-the-spot profile evaluation by expert counselors. Discover how you can make your dream of studying in Germany a reality with MetaApply IE’s expert guidance.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Event Agenda: - Talk directly to top university representatives - Get on-the-spot profile evaluation - Learn about admission process & requirements - Interactive Q&A session

item.title: Duolingo Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join our Live Duolingo Webinar on 12 October 2025 (Sunday) from 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM (IST) and learn how to achieve your best Duolingo score with expert-led strategies. This free session will help you master grammar, improve speaking skills, and boost your vocabulary with practical learning hacks. Plus, get a FREE Vocabulary e-book, 1 FREE Speaking Mock, and 10% off on Duolingo Masterclass enrollment.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Event Agenda - - Learn quick and effective Duolingo preparation hacks - Master grammar and speaking skills - Get a free vocabulary e-book and mock test - Live Q&A with expert trainers

item.title: Scotland’s Rural College Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an exclusive webinar on Scotland’s Rural College (SRUC). Gain a deeper understanding of SRUC’s academic strengths, course offerings, and student support ecosystem — enabling you to guide prospective students more effectively. - In this session, you will learn:
  • All PG programs available for January 2026 intake
  • Detailed admission criteria, application timelines, and scholarship opportunities
  • Career prospects and industry demand in the UK
  • Student support, campus life, and global exposure opportunities
  • Direct insights and answers during a live Q&A session
Presented by SRUC Representatives:
  • Michel Lawson (Head of International) ,
  • Hirak Mandal (Recruitment Manager, India, Nepal, Sri Lanka & Bangladesh)
  • Rana Abdur(Recruitment Manager, Pakistan)

item.title: MBBS in Georgia Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an exclusive partner-focused webinar dedicated to MBBS opportunities in Georgia, one of the most preferred and high-demand destinations for medical aspirants. Discover why Georgia continues to attract students from around the world and how you can still recruit for the 2025 intake. In this session, we’ll cover:
  • Top medical universities in Georgia and their key advantages
  • Detailed eligibility criteria and the complete admission process
  • Tuition fees, scholarship opportunities, and value-for-money insights
  • Partner commissions, incentives, and lead support
  • Live Q&A to answer all your MBBS-related queries
Don’t miss this opportunity to maximise conversions and support students still exploring MBBS in Georgia for 2025!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: MBBS in Georgia 2025 Intake – Admissions Still Open!

item.title: ICEF Berlin 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
MetaApply IE is at ICEF Berlin 2025! Connect with our experts at Booth 88 to explore study abroad opportunities, learn how we support universities as well as recruitment partners, and discuss potential collaborations. Meet our leadership team and start shaping the future of international education together:
  • Prashant Sali, Co-CEO
  • Vanita Kerai, Co-CEO
  • Marcelo Melo, Sales & Marketing Director
  • Marcela Amaral, Product Director
Swing by Booth 88 – let’s connect, collaborate, and make global education more accessible. For more details, reach out to partnerships@metaapply.io

item.title: Jaipur- 22nd November 2025
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
The MetaApply IE International Education Fair in Jaipur invites you to explore global education pathways and meet representatives from 20+ international universities,all in one place. Whether you’re a recent 12th-grade graduate or a student who has completed an undergraduate degree, this fair is your gateway to discovering the best study-abroad options. Learn about top universities and courses, understand scholarship opportunities, get expert visa guidance, and explore English proficiency exams, educational loans, and more. Join us on 22nd November 2025 and walk into our experience centre to kick-start your successful study-abroad journey! Event Agenda :
  • Meet representatives from 20+ global universities
  • Explore top courses, scholarships, and study-abroad options
  • Get personalised visa guidance from certified counsellors
  • Understand English proficiency exam requirements (IELTS, PTE, Duolingo)
  • Learn about education loans and guaranteed financial planning support
  • Attend a live Q&A with international education experts

item.title: MBBS Admissions Updates for Georgia, Uzbekistan & Philippines
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Register now and get the latest MBBS updates that help recruitment partners convert more students quickly. This focused session gives you practical insights to guide students confidently and secure admissions faster. In this session you’ll learn: • New MBBS updates across Georgia, Uzbekistan & Philippines • Entry & visa requirements you must communicate • Key points to highlight for higher conversions • Proven process to support quicker student admissions Presented by: Keshav Pathak (Manager-MBBS Abroad) Anandita Jitt (Product Success Manager)

item.title: The MBBS Talk
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
The MBBS market has changed, and staying relevant now requires deeper insight, sharper strategy, and the right partner approach. Register now for this exclusive webinar designed for education consultants and recruitment partners in India seeking clarity on current MBBS trends, opportunities, and conversions across India and abroad. In this session, you’ll learn:
  • Current and future MBBS demand trends in India and overseas
  • High-potential study destinations for medical aspirants
  • How partner opportunities in MBBS admissions are evolving
  • A structured conversion framework to improve enrolments
  • Strategic insights to strengthen MBBS counselling and closure
Presented by: Sreenidhi Vasudevan Zonal Head – B2B, MetaApply IE 🗓️ 27th January 2026 ⏰ 3:30 PM – 4:30 PM (IST)

item.title: The University of Law Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Calling all recruitment partners in India and Bhutan for an exclusive webinar on The University of Law, where you will gain key insights into postgraduate and law programs, upcoming intakes, scholarships, and the latest admission updates to strengthen your counselling and conversion strategy. In this session, you’ll get to know about:
  • In-depth overview of postgraduate and law programs
  • Upcoming intakes and application timelines
  • Scholarship opportunities and funding support
  • Recent updates to admission requirements
  • Best practices to improve counselling effectiveness and enrolments
Presented by: Sagar Mehra Senior Manager – Business Development (India & Bhutan) The University of Law 🗓️ 28th January 2026 ⏰ 3:00 PM (IST)

item.title: ICEF Dubai 2026
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Let’s Shape the Future of Global Education, Together. MetaApply IE is excited to be at ICEF Dubai 2026 from 12th–14th February 2026.
Meet Prashant Sali, Co-CEO – MetaApply IE, at Exhibit Table 18 and explore how purposeful collaboration, smarter recruitment strategies, and student-first thinking can unlock new global pathways for your institution.
This isn’t just a meeting, it’s the beginning of meaningful partnerships designed to drive sustainable international growth. Let’s connect, collaborate, and create opportunities without borders.

item.title: ICEF South Asia 2026 – Colombo
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Empowering South Asia’s Global Education Ambitions.
Join MetaApply IE at ICEF South Asia 2026 – Colombo, from 16th–18th February 2026. Connect with Prashant Sali, Co-CEO – MetaApply IE, at Exhibit Table 8 to discuss emerging market trends, evolving student aspirations, and how strategic alliances can transform recruitment success across the region.
Together, we can build stronger pathways, unlock new markets, and deliver real impact for students and institutions alike. Let’s start a conversation that shapes tomorrow’s global opportunities.

item.title: Study Abroad Profile Assessment Day – 28th February 2026
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Transform your global education dreams into a well-defined roadmap. Join MetaApply IE’s exclusive Profile Assessment Day and receive a personalised evaluation of your academic background, career goals, and global study options. Our expert counsellors will help you understand where you stand and what it takes to secure admission to leading international universities. Time: 10:00 AM-7:00 PM Location: MetaApply Study Abroad Centre Ahmedabad | Bengaluru | Hyderabad | Pune What’s in it for you:
  • 1:1 personalised profile evaluation
  • Course and university shortlisting guidance
  • Psychometric assessment for career clarity
  • Application roadmap and next-step strategy
  • Eligibility-based benefits and exclusive support

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Study Abroad Profile Assessment Day – 28th February 2026

item.title: Study Abroad Profile Assessment Day (Kolkata)
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Turn your international study aspirations into a personalised success plan. Join MetaApply IE’s exclusive Profile Assessment Day in Kolkata, where our expert counsellors will evaluate your academic profile, clarify your goals, and guide you on the best global university options. Get insights, recommendations, and a clear roadmap to boost your chances of admission abroad. Time: 10:00AM-7:00PM Location: MetaApply Study Abroad Centre, Russel St, Park Street Area, Kolkata What’s in it for you:
  • 1:1 personalised profile evaluation
  • Course and university shortlisting tailored to you
  • Psychometric assessment for career direction
  • Step-by-step application planning
  • Eligibility-based benefits & expert support

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Study Abroad Profile Assessment Day (Kolkata) – 28th February 2026

item.title: UAE, Singapore & Malaysia Study Visa Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join this focused webinar to gain clear, structured insights into study visa processes for UAE, Singapore and Malaysia. The session is designed to simplify requirements, timelines and financial criteria while helping participants understand how to avoid common visa challenges. What’s in it for you • Complete overview of study visa requirements • Tuition fees and living cost insights • Step-by-step visa process and expected timelines • Financial documentation and eligibility guidance • Common rejection reasons and profile-strengthening strategies

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: UAE, Singapore & Malaysia Study Visa Webinar

item.title: The Global Test Blueprint
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Choosing the right international exam can shape your entire study abroad journey. Join our LIVE webinar and decode how universities really evaluate applications across UG, PG, and MBA programs. From SAT vs AP to GRE vs GMAT, and IELTS vs TOEFL vs PTE; get clarity on which exam aligns best with your goals. Led by Sunithi Sony, National Academic Head - MetaApply IE, this session will help you build a smart test strategy, avoid common mistakes, and move one step closer to your dream university. Agenda - 1. How Global Universities Really Evaluate Applications 2. UG Pathway Clarity – SAT & AP Explained 3. PG & MBA Exams – GRE vs GMAT Decoded 4. Your Strategic Test Selection Framework 5. Common Mistakes Students Make 6. Interactive Q&A

item.title: Master SAT Verbal in 60-Minutes
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
If you’re planning to study abroad, the SAT is more than just another exam. In competitive admissions, a high Verbal score signals strong analytical and academic readiness. We, being the one-stop-solution for Study abroad, understand how strategic SAT score can open better options globally. That’s why we are here with our expert SAT trainer to bring you this focused masterclass. What will you Master?
  • Decode Complex Passages with Speed & Strategic Clarity
  • Eliminate Trap Choices Using Proven Pattern Recognition
  • High-Frequency Questions & Hacks
How This Helps Your Global Admissions?
  • Strengthens your academic profile
  • Enhances competitiveness for top universities
  • Adds weight to your overall study abroad application
If you’re serious about getting into top global universities, this session will give you clarity, direction, and a smarter way to prepare. Book your seats now!

item.title: Master SAT Math in 60-Minutes
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Planning to ace SAT Math? It’s not just about knowing formulae, it’s about control, clarity, and smart decision-making under time pressure. As a one-stop solution for study abroad, MetaApply understands how a high math score can enhance your academic profile. That’s why we’re bringing back our expert SAT trainer for a focused, high-impact Math masterclass. What will you Master? • Advanced Algebra & Functions mastery for the SAT • Trap question decoding methods • Pattern recognition & smart estimation shortcuts • Calculator efficiency hacks (without overdependence) • High-frequency question pattern training How This Helps Your Global Admissions? • Strengthens your overall SAT composite score • Improves competitiveness for top universities • Supports applications for STEM & quantitative programs • Enhances scholarship potential If you want to approach SAT Math with confidence, not panic, this masterclass will help you think sharper, move faster, and finish stronger. Book your seats now!

item.title: Global Admissions Day at MetaApply Study Abroad Centres
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Confused about how to begin your study abroad journey? Attend Global Admissions Open House Day at your nearest MetaApply centre and get expert guidance to plan your abroad education journey with confidence. In this event, our expert will review your academic profile, career interests, and goals to help you understand the best-fit countries, universities, and next steps. What you’ll get:
  • 1:1 Premium Counselling
  • Complimentary Psychometric Assessment to identify strengths and interests
  • University & Eligibility Evaluation
  • Free English language test preparation for eligible students
  • Customized application strategy and timeline
How this session helps you?
  • Understand your profile and admission potential
  • Explore universities that align with your goals
  • Learn about eligibility requirements and scholarship options
  • Avoid common mistakes in the application process
  • Create a clear action plan for upcoming intakes
Seats are limited. Register now to secure your spot and begin your global education journey.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Global Admissions Day at MetaApply Study Abroad Centres

item.title: MBBS Abroad Counselling Day - PAN India
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Get the clarity you need to start your medical career abroad Join us at the MetaApply Study Abroad Centres - Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, Pune, and Noida, for an exclusive counselling experience designed to help you make confident, informed decisions about studying MBBS overseas. Connect with our experts in and get personalized guidance on your profile, global opportunities, and the path to securing admission. What you’ll get • 1:1 premium counselling with admission experts • Shortlisting of countries and universities based on your profile • Guidance on eligibility, admissions, and next steps • Free English test preparation for eligible students What you’ll walk away with • A clear understanding of where your profile fits globally • Insights into costs, requirements, and admission timelines • A structured plan to move ahead with your MBBS abroad application Seats are limited! Register now to secure your spot and take the first step toward your medical career abroad.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: MBBS Abroad Counselling Day - PAN India

item.title: Spain and Netherlands Study Visa Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Join the MetaApply IE Visa Webinar focused on Spain and the Netherlands and gain practical insights to strengthen your students’ visa success. Learn about documentation preparation, timelines, financial requirements, key visa rules, and common mistakes that can impact approvals. Guide your students with the right strategy for their Europe journey.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Spain and Netherlands Study Visa Webinar

item.title: MBA Abroad Counselling Day - PAN India
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded: Thinking about an MBA abroad but unsure where to start? Join us at the MetaApply Study Abroad Centres - Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, and Pune, for an exclusive counselling experience designed to help you make confident, informed decisions about your MBA journey overseas. Connect with our experts and get personalised guidance on your profile, global opportunities and the path to securing admission and achieving your career goals. What you’ll get: • 1:1 premium counselling with experts • Shortlisting of universities based on your profile and career goals • Guidance on eligibility, applications, and timelines • Complimentary psychometric assessment • Free English test preparation for eligible students What you’ll walk away with • A clear understanding of which MBA programs fit your profile • Insights into costs, return on investment, and career opportunities • A structured plan to move forward with your MBA abroad application Seats are limited! Register now to secure your spot and take the next step in your global career.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: MBA Abroad Counselling Day - PAN India

item.title: Western Balkans University Webinar
item.dc:creator: Dikshita Bhasin
item.content:encoded:
Discover Why Western Balkans University is a Smart Choice for MBBS Abroad What You’ll Learn
  • Complete overview of the university & global accreditations
  • Step-by-step plan for September 2026 intake
  • Eligibility criteria & detailed fee structure
  • Career pathways after MBBS Abroad
  • Q&A session
Speakers : 1. Sefer Vrana Head of Admissions – International Students Western Balkans University 2. Keshav Pathak Manager MBBS Abroad MetaApply IE

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover Why Western Balkans University is a Smart Choice for MBBS Abroad
